item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts We Win Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 62.50
item.description: With a remarkable 71.97% gain over the past year, We Win Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 62.50 on 11 Jun 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 4.33% during the same period. This milestone caps a sustained rally fuelled by strong technical momentum and a series of bullish signals across multiple timeframes. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Mayur Uniquoters Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 636.55
item.description: With every major technical indicator aligned to the upside, Mayur Uniquoters Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 636.55, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum despite a broadly declining market backdrop on 11 Jun 2026. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Shyam Metalics & Energy Ltd Reports Strong Quarterly Turnaround with Record Revenue and Profit Margins
item.description: Shyam Metalics & Energy Ltd has demonstrated a remarkable financial turnaround in the quarter ended March 2026, posting record-high net sales and profit margins that mark a significant improvement over recent quarters. This shift from a negative to a positive financial trend has been accompanied by an upgrade in its Mojo Grade from Sell to Hold, signalling renewed investor confidence amid a challenging iron and steel sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Iris Clothings Ltd Reports Strong Quarterly Growth, Upgrades Financial Trend to Very Positive
item.description: Iris Clothings Ltd has delivered a markedly improved financial performance in the quarter ended March 2026, signalling a significant turnaround from its previously flat trend. The company posted record quarterly figures across key metrics, reflecting robust operational execution despite ongoing sector headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bank Of Baroda Reports Flat Quarterly Financial Trend Amid Mixed Performance
item.description: Bank Of Baroda’s latest quarterly results for March 2026 reveal a plateau in financial growth, with key metrics showing a shift from positive momentum to a flat trend. Despite this, the bank has demonstrated strength in margin expansion and asset quality, underscoring a mixed but resilient performance in a challenging macroeconomic environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: D B Corp Ltd Reports Stabilised Financial Trend Amid Mixed Market Returns
item.description: D B Corp Ltd, a key player in India’s media and entertainment sector, reported a flat financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, marking a notable shift from its previous negative trend. The company’s profit before tax excluding other income surged by 39.4%, signalling operational resilience despite a challenging macroeconomic environment. This article analyses the recent quarterly results in the context of historical trends and broader market performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Sharply as Market Breadth Deteriorates; Healthcare Sector Shines
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a broad-based decline on 11 May 2026, with the Sensex falling 1.70% and the Nifty closing down 1.49%, pressured by weak sectoral performance and subdued investor sentiment. While healthcare emerged as the lone sector advancing, most other sectors and market capitalisation segments faced selling pressure amid cautious global cues and mixed domestic flows. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: SRG Housing Finance Ltd Reports Very Positive Quarterly Performance Amid Market Outperformance
item.description: SRG Housing Finance Ltd has delivered a very positive financial performance in the quarter ended March 2026, marking a significant turnaround from its previous trend. The company posted record-high revenue and profitability metrics, signalling a robust recovery in its core housing finance operations despite a challenging macroeconomic environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness Amid Select Bright Spots on 11 May 2026
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index declined by 0.96% on 11 May 2026, reflecting a cautious mood among investors despite pockets of strong performance within the segment. While select stocks delivered robust returns, the overall breadth indicators reveal a market grappling with uneven sectoral momentum and profit-taking pressures. Time: 1 hour ago
